name: Energy & Utilities Calculators
description: Free energy calculators — electric bill estimator, appliance costs, EV vs gas, solar payback, heat pump savings, pool heating, fuel comparison, battery backup, and more.
metaTitle: Energy & Utilities Calculators — Free Tools for Homeowners
metaDescription: 28 free energy calculators: compare electricity rates, estimate appliance costs, calculate EV savings, size batteries, find rebates, and compare heating fuels. Updated for 2026.

subcategories.name: Electricity Costs
subcategories.description: Estimate your electric bill, calculate appliance running costs, find phantom loads, compare rates, and understand time-of-use pricing.

subcategories.name: Solar & Battery Storage
subcategories.description: Calculate solar payback, battery backup sizing, storage needs, and net metering credits.

subcategories.name: Heating & Cooling
subcategories.description: Compare heating fuels, estimate pool heating costs, calculate thermostat and insulation savings, and find water heater payback.

subcategories.name: EV & Transportation
subcategories.description: Compare EV vs gas car total costs and estimate home charger installation expenses.

subcategories.name: Rebates & Incentives
subcategories.description: Estimate energy rebates and calculate audit ROI under the IRA including HOMES, HEAR, and federal tax credits.

subcategories.name: Carbon & Environment
subcategories.description: Calculate your home energy carbon footprint and see how to reduce emissions.
